name: tokf
install_doc:
cargo install tokf
# Or via install script:
curl -sSf https://tokf.net/install.sh | sh
# Then add hook to Claude Code settings.json (tokf install-hook)
notes: Rust CLI proxy + TOML-driven filter library. Works as a shell hook (Claude Code PreToolUse/PostToolUse) that intercepts Bash command output and routes it through per-command TOML filter configs. Cache-safe: compacts tool OUTPUT only, does not rewrite conversation history. Targets Claude Code primarily (hook integration), also usable as a standalone pipe. Filter pipeline: skip/keep regex, dedup (consecutive/windowed), section capture, JSON extraction, tree restructuring, regex replace, Lua escape hatch. User-overridable stdlib filters; server mode for shared use.
